properties.displayName: Abu Dhabi Healthcare Information and Cyber Security Standard v2
properties.description: This initiative maps Azure Policy definitions to the Abu Dhabi Health Information and Cyber Security Standard (ADHICS) v2 controls for healthcare organisations in the Abu Dhabi emirate. It covers PHI protection, clinical system security, medical device security, and healthcare-specific governance.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: ADHICS_GOV
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Controls covering healthcare cybersecurity policy, CISO leadership, and risk management framework requirements.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: ADHICS_PHI
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Controls covering PHI encryption at rest and in transit, access controls, data masking, and audit logging for protected health information.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: ADHICS_IAM
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Controls covering healthcare user authentication with MFA, privileged access for clinical systems, patient identity verification, and clinician credential management.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: ADHICS_NET
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Controls covering clinical network segmentation, medical device network isolation, healthcare API security, and telehealth platform security.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: ADHICS_APP
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Controls covering EHR system security, clinical application hardening, medical imaging (PACS/DICOM) security, and laboratory information system security.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: ADHICS_DEV
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Controls covering medical device inventory management, patch management with vendor coordination, device security monitoring, and device incident response.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: ADHICS_DATA
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Controls covering healthcare data classification, clinical data retention, research data de-identification, and healthcare data backup and recovery.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: ADHICS_COMP
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Controls covering HIPAA compliance, healthcare audit logging, breach notification procedures, and patient privacy rights management.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: ADHICS_BC
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Controls covering clinical system high availability, emergency access procedures, disaster recovery testing, and clinical system failover capabilities.
